Id1.text: Allen Forrest, a solo singer who performs acoustic music, was born in Fort Campbell, KY and was raised in the town of Dothan, AL.

Id2.text: Allen Forrest was born in Fort Campbell, KY and was raised in Dothan, AL. He was originally a solo singer and now plays acoustic music.

Id3.text: Allen Forrest was born in Fort Campbell, Kentucky but was raised in Dothan, Alabama. He plays acoustic music and was a solo singer.
